scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @home-land/database && npm run build -w @home-land/contracts && npm run build -w @home-land/api && npm run build -w @home-land/web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names web,api --prefix-colors green,cyan "npm run dev -w @home-land/web" "npm run dev -w @home-land/api"
